eng.definition: Tending to induce drowsiness or sleep.
examples: The soporific effect of the medication helped him sleep.
The lecture had a soporific effect on the audience.
Her voice had a soporific quality that soothed the baby.

hin.definition: The state or fact of having a duty to deal with something or of having control over someone
examples: हमें अपने उत्तरदायित्व को समझना चाहिए.
तुम्हारी उत्तरदायित्व है कि तुम उसे सुरक्षित रखो.
मैं अपने उत्तरदायित्वों को पूरा करने का प्रयास कर रहा हूँ.
